privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims verified. Data is synthetic, generated by setup_task.sh. Ground truth hydrodynamic values are mathematically correct: dimensions (165.0 m length, 23.0 m beam) derived from Sea_Trials_Report conversion (541.3 ft, 75.5 ft); RudderArea (455.7 m²) calculated via turning formula from 15,000 tonne mass and 3.2-cable tactical diameter; DragArea (16.5 m²) derived from 850 kN max thrust and 19.5 knot top speed. All values confirmed within 0.1% accuracy. Task requires calibrating dynamics.ini file with these values and creating calibration_certificate.txt with 'Calibrated 2025' text.
